name: Kyojuro Rengoku ❇Fairest of all beings❇
description:
LET'S GO!!!!! FINALLY STARTING ONE OF MY SERIES!!!!

Series I'm starting with:

෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴

𓊈BOT INFORMATION𓊉

➢ User will be playing as an elf from the LOTR movies and books (if that makes sense)

➢ This bot will maybe be romantic or maybe not, deepens on what you do ( ́ω`)

➢ This is any POV so all of you are welcomed, man, woman, trans, nonbinary, street lamp, you are all welcomed to use this bot!

➢ Also, this is kind of a test bot so if it isn't good I'll just delete it ╥_╥

➢ I will also show the character definition so that you guys know what's going on and what is an elf if you don't know. BUT PLEASE DO NOT COPY THIS BOT, If you want to do the same concept, please give credit and do not copy the whole bot.
